No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course's focus on 'Crisis Management' and 'Crisis Communication' provides skills applicable to managing public health risks and early warning systems (Target 3.d).

Quality Education.reason: As a graduate-level course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and cultivates critical thinking skills relevant to sustainable development (Target 4.7).
evidence: At a graduate-level, this course is aimed to enable students to achieve a sophisticated level of mastery

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops professional skills in public relations and communication management, contributing to productive employment and decent work (Target 8.5).
evidence: develop understanding of public relations and communication management

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course explicitly covers 'Social Media PR' and 'PR & AI,' directly linking to technological upgrading and innovation in industrial sectors (Target 9.5, 9.b).
evidence: PR & AI. 公共關係與人工智慧

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course's focus on crisis management and communication directly supports building resilience to disasters and implementing risk management in human settlements (Target 11.5, 11.b).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: Corporate PR and communication ethics are relevant to encouraging companies to adopt sustainable practices and integrate sustainability information into reporting (Target 12.6).

Climate Action.reason: Crisis management and public communication skills are highly relevant for strengthening resilience to climate-related hazards (Target 13.1) and for awareness-raising (Target 13.3).

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to marine ecosystems.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to terrestrial ecosystems.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Public communication, communication ethics, and defining PR are central to developing effective, accountable, and transparent institutions and ensuring public access to information (Targets 16.6, 16.10).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Public relations and communication skills are foundational for building and managing effective multi-stakeholder partnerships, as emphasized in Targets 17.16 and 17.17.
